resolvedFindings: Replaced the overlapping navigation pill with an in-flow route footer and a compact persistent motion control.
Added authored, domain-specific no-WebGL compositions instead of generic empty fallbacks.
Separated Pressure Atlas telemetry, depth controls, and non-drag lens controls across desktop and mobile.
Added Vitreum repair callouts, fasteners, connector detail, an original silhouette, and a lightweight custom GLSL Fresnel shell.
Recomposed Foldline around an editorial serif thesis, fixed-step Verlet cloth, pinned selvedge, crease, seam, and collision-safe controls.
Contained lazy-scene, WebGL creation, context-loss, and raster-media failures while preserving semantic headings and actions.
Removed Vitreum-only backdrop blur layers and kept every fixed motion control inside a reserved rail clear of semantic content at tested scroll positions.
Recomposed 200-percent text zoom and 320-pixel reflow after target-level clipping checks exposed a mobile Pressure Atlas headline defect.
Reset Foldline state transitions and added restrained crease restoration so the Fold interaction remains a controlled textile page instead of leaving the viewport.
Captured every retained screenshot in an isolated browser process to remove shared-compositor contamination from fallback evidence.

finalObservations.pressureAtlas: The fluid lens, transect markers, depth readout, generated accession specimen, and static bathymetric fallback form one evidence-led visual language.
finalObservations.vitreum: The cyan optical shell, exposed logic and power layers, repair labels, and condensed editorial type read as a fictional repairability instrument rather than an existing handset imitation.
finalObservations.foldline: The draping page, stitched route, textile macro, serif/italic composition, and woven static fallback make cloth the navigation and proof system rather than a decorative texture.
finalObservations.mobile: All three 390-pixel captures retain the thesis, action, signature visual, and persistent motion control without horizontal overflow.
finalObservations.fallbacks: The no-WebGL states remain visibly authored and materially distinct from the enhanced Three.js states.

limitations: Visual review is a bounded Chromium review, not proof of global uniqueness or universal taste.
Automated accessibility and lab performance evidence do not replace field telemetry or a full assistive-technology audit.
The studies are fictional demonstrations; their claims are intentionally scoped and do not establish external product or scientific facts.
